arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Barcelona admission re-emerges amid Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold is closing in on a free transfer move to Spanish giants Real Madrid but some historic comments about their fierce rivals Barcelona could make things awkward

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Osasuna: Predicted XI for La Liga clash amid Inigo Martinez, Pau Cubarsi injury concerns
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Barcelona could line up for Thursday's La Liga clash against Osasuna at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Barcelona planning September return to Spotify Camp Nou
arts.sum: Barcelona had hoped to be back at the Spotify Camp Nou by now, but delays mean that it more likely that they return next season. As such, the idea is for the first team to see out their remaining home matches in the current campaign at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys, which has been their […] The post Barcelona planning September return to Spotify Camp Nou appeared first on Football España.
